title: GitHub - akon47/NvChat
excerpt: Contribute to akon47/NvChat development by creating an account on GitHub.
content_html:
A Windows desktop app to chat with the free LLMs on build.nvidia.com

Streaming chat · saved conversations · live markdown/code rendering · reasoning display · image attachments · in-app auto-update — ships as a single .exe

English · 한국어


Markdown renders live as the answer streams in.

✨ Features

  • Model picker — loads the live model list via /v1/models (falls back to a curated list on failure)
  • Streaming chat — real-time token streaming with an instant Stop button
  • Live markdown while streaming — formatting renders as the answer arrives (like Claude / ChatGPT), not only when it finishes
  • Reasoning display — collapsible thinking for models that emit reasoning_content / <think> (deepseek-r1, etc.)
  • Image attachments (vision) — attach images to ask vision models (llama-3.2-vision, etc.); large images are auto-downscaled
  • In-app auto-update — checks GitHub Releases, downloads the new .exe, verifies its SHA-256, and swaps itself in place (single-file friendly, no installer)
  • Per-conversation usage — tracks requests and prompt/completion tokens per model, so you can see what each model spent in a conversation (even across mid-chat model switches)
  • Desktop launcher — a global hotkey (default Ctrl+Shift+Space) pops a quick-chat mini window from anywhere + system tray (close minimizes to tray)
  • Personalization — custom instructions (about you / response style) applied to every chat + reusable prompt presets
  • Searchable model picker — filter 100+ models by typing
  • Message actions — regenerate a response, edit & resend a user message, delete or copy individual messages
  • Selectable markdown — headings/lists/nested & task lists/quotes/tables/links, syntax-highlighted code blocks with a copy button; assistant text is drag-selectable
  • Conversation management — sidebar search, date groups (Today/Yesterday/…), pin, rename, autosave, model-generated auto titles
  • Per-conversation settings — system prompt, Temperature/Top P/Max Tokens/Penalties
  • Export — copy the whole conversation or save as Markdown
  • Quality of life — scroll-to-bottom button, remembers window size/position, collapsible sidebar, keyboard shortcuts
  • Safe storage — API key encrypted with Windows DPAPI, atomic file writes + automatic backup of corrupt files
  • Multi-language — English & Korean UI, switchable in Settings (defaults to your Windows language on first run)
  • UI — custom borderless dark theme with an NVIDIA-green accent; ChatGPT/Claude-style layout (bubble only on your messages)

📦 Download

Grab the single NvChat.exe from Releases and run it. It's a self-contained single file that runs even without the .NET runtime installed. (Windows x64)

First run: the app isn't code-signed, so Windows SmartScreen may show a blue "Windows protected your PC" prompt. Click More info → Run anyway.

Once you're on a build with auto-update, new versions are offered inside the app — no need to re-download manually.

🔑 Get an API key

  1. Sign in to build.nvidia.com
  2. On any model page, click Get API Key to create an nvapi-... key
  3. Paste it into the Settings window on first launch (or the ⚙ button), then Test connection → Save

The key is stored only on this PC + this Windows account, encrypted with DPAPI (%APPDATA%\NvChat\settings.json). It cannot be decrypted on another PC/account.

⌨️ Shortcuts

Key Action
Enter Send (switchable to Ctrl+Enter in Settings)
Shift+Enter New line
Ctrl+N New conversation
Ctrl+Shift+Space Quick chat from anywhere (global · configurable)

🛠️ Build from source

# Run for development
dotnet run --project NvChat/NvChat.csproj

# Build the single-file release exe
dotnet publish NvChat/NvChat.csproj -c Release
# → NvChat/bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/NvChat.exe

Requires the .NET 8 SDK (Windows).

🚀 Releases (automated)

Pushing a v* tag triggers a GitHub Actions workflow (release.yml) that builds the single NvChat.exe, publishes a matching NvChat.exe.sha256, and uploads both to that tag's Release. The app's in-app updater uses that checksum to verify downloads.

git tag v1.0.0
git push origin v1.0.0

🧩 Tech

.NET 8 / WPF (net8.0-windows), MVVM, a custom WindowView (borderless WindowChrome), a dark palette, and a self-written markdown renderer + syntax highlighter — no external UI libraries.

  • Endpoint: https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1 (OpenAI-compatible, configurable in Settings)
  • Data: %APPDATA%\NvChat\ (settings.json, conversations.json)
  • The free tier has rate limits — on HTTP 429, retry after a moment.

📄 License

MIT — free to use, modify, and distribute.

sentences.en: Streaming chat · saved conversations · live markdown/code rendering · reasoning display · image attachments · in-app auto-update — ships as a single .exe
sentences.zh: 流式聊天 · 保存的对话 · 实时降价/代码渲染 · 推理显示 · 图像附件 · 应用内自动更新 - 作为单个 .exe 提供

blocks.html_en: • Model picker — loads the live model list via /v1/models (falls back to a curated list on failure)

sentences.en: Model picker — loads the live model list via /v1/models (falls back to a curated list on failure)

blocks.html_en: • Streaming chat — real-time token streaming with an instant Stop button

sentences.en: Streaming chat — real-time token streaming with an instant Stop button
sentences.zh: 流式聊天 — 带有即时停止按钮的实时令牌流

blocks.html_en: • Live markdown while streaming — formatting renders as the answer arrives (like Claude / ChatGPT), not only when it finishes

sentences.en: Live markdown while streaming — formatting renders as the answer arrives (like Claude / ChatGPT), not only when it finishes
sentences.zh: 流式传输时实时降价 - 格式在答案到达时呈现（如 Claude / ChatGPT），而不仅仅是在完成时呈现

blocks.html_en: • Reasoning display — collapsible thinking for models that emit reasoning_content / <think> (deepseek-r1, etc.)

sentences.en: Reasoning display — collapsible thinking for models that emit reasoning_content / <think> (deepseek-r1, etc.)
sentences.zh: 推理显示 - 发出 Reasoning_content / <think> 的模型的可折叠思维（deepseek-r1 等）

blocks.html_en: • Image attachments (vision) — attach images to ask vision models (llama-3.2-vision, etc.); large images are auto-downscaled

sentences.en: Image attachments (vision) — attach images to ask vision models (llama-3.2-vision, etc.); large images are auto-downscaled
sentences.zh: 图像附件（视觉）——附加图像以询问视觉模型（llama-3.2-vision 等）；大图像会自动缩小

blocks.html_en: • In-app auto-update — checks GitHub Releases, downloads the new .exe, verifies its SHA-256, and swaps itself in place (single-file friendly, no installer)

sentences.en: In-app auto-update — checks GitHub Releases, downloads the new .exe, verifies its SHA-256, and swaps itself in place (single-file friendly, no installer)
sentences.zh: 应用内自动更新 - 检查 GitHub 版本，下载新的 .exe，验证其 SHA-256，然后将其自身交换到位（单文件友好，无安装程序）

blocks.html_en: • Per-conversation usage — tracks requests and prompt/completion tokens per model, so you can see what each model spent in a conversation (even across mid-chat model switches)

sentences.en: Per-conversation usage — tracks requests and prompt/completion tokens per model, so you can see what each model spent in a conversation (even across mid-chat model switches)
sentences.zh: 每个对话的使用情况 - 跟踪每个模型的请求和提示/完成令牌，以便您可以查看每个模型在对话中花费的内容（甚至跨聊天中模型切换）

blocks.html_en: • Desktop launcher — a global hotkey (default Ctrl+Shift+Space) pops a quick-chat mini window from anywhere + system tray (close minimizes to tray)

sentences.en: Desktop launcher — a global hotkey (default Ctrl+Shift+Space) pops a quick-chat mini window from anywhere + system tray (close minimizes to tray)
sentences.zh: 桌面启动器 - 全局热键（默认 Ctrl+Shift+Space）可从任意位置弹出快速聊天迷你窗口 + 系统托盘（关闭最小化到托盘）

blocks.html_en: • Personalization — custom instructions (about you / response style) applied to every chat + reusable prompt presets

sentences.en: Personalization — custom instructions (about you / response style) applied to every chat + reusable prompt presets
sentences.zh: 个性化 - 应用于每个聊天的自定义说明（关于您/响应风格）+可重复使用的提示预设

blocks.html_en: • Searchable model picker — filter 100+ models by typing

sentences.en: Searchable model picker — filter 100+ models by typing
sentences.zh: 可搜索模型选择器 — 通过键入过滤 100 多个模型

blocks.html_en: • Message actions — regenerate a response, edit & resend a user message, delete or copy individual messages

sentences.en: Message actions — regenerate a response, edit & resend a user message, delete or copy individual messages
sentences.zh: 消息操作 - 重新生成响应、编辑和重新发送用户消息、删除或复制单个消息

blocks.html_en: • Selectable markdown — headings/lists/nested & task lists/quotes/tables/links, syntax-highlighted code blocks with a copy button; assistant text is drag-selectable

sentences.en: Selectable markdown — headings/lists/nested & task lists/quotes/tables/links, syntax-highlighted code blocks with a copy button; assistant text is drag-selectable
sentences.zh: 可选择的降价 - 标题/列表/嵌套和任务列表/引用/表格/链接，带有复制按钮的语法突出显示的代码块；辅助文本可通过拖动选择

blocks.html_en: • Conversation management — sidebar search, date groups (Today/Yesterday/…), pin, rename, autosave, model-generated auto titles

sentences.en: Conversation management — sidebar search, date groups (Today/Yesterday/…), pin, rename, autosave, model-generated auto titles
sentences.zh: 对话管理 - 侧边栏搜索、日期组（今天/昨天/...）、固定、重命名、自动保存、模型生成的自动标题

blocks.html_en: • Per-conversation settings — system prompt, Temperature/Top P/Max Tokens/Penalties

sentences.en: Per-conversation settings — system prompt, Temperature/Top P/Max Tokens/Penalties
sentences.zh: 每个对话设置 - 系统提示、温度/最高 P/最大令牌/惩罚

blocks.html_en: • Export — copy the whole conversation or save as Markdown

sentences.en: Export — copy the whole conversation or save as Markdown
sentences.zh: 导出 — 复制整个对话或另存为 Markdown

blocks.html_en: • Quality of life — scroll-to-bottom button, remembers window size/position, collapsible sidebar, keyboard shortcuts

sentences.en: Quality of life — scroll-to-bottom button, remembers window size/position, collapsible sidebar, keyboard shortcuts
sentences.zh: 生活质量 — 滚动到底部按钮、记住窗口大小/位置、可折叠侧边栏、键盘快捷键

blocks.html_en: • Safe storage — API key encrypted with Windows DPAPI, atomic file writes + automatic backup of corrupt files

sentences.en: Safe storage — API key encrypted with Windows DPAPI, atomic file writes + automatic backup of corrupt files
sentences.zh: 安全存储 — 使用 Windows DPAPI 加密的 API 密钥、原子文件写入 + 损坏文件的自动备份

blocks.html_en: • Multi-language — English & Korean UI, switchable in Settings (defaults to your Windows language on first run)

sentences.en: Multi-language — English & Korean UI, switchable in Settings (defaults to your Windows language on first run)
sentences.zh: 多语言 — 英语和韩语 UI，可在“设置”中切换（首次运行时默认为您的 Windows 语言）

blocks.html_en: • UI — custom borderless dark theme with an NVIDIA-green accent; ChatGPT/Claude-style layout (bubble only on your messages)

sentences.en: UI — custom borderless dark theme with an NVIDIA-green accent; ChatGPT/Claude-style layout (bubble only on your messages)
sentences.zh: UI — 带有 NVIDIA 绿色口音的自定义无边框深色主题； ChatGPT/Claude 风格的布局（仅在您的消息上出现气泡）

content_html_zh:
一款 Windows 桌面应用程序，可与 build.nvidia.com 上的免费法学硕士聊天

流式聊天 · 保存的对话 · 实时降价/代码渲染 · 推理显示 · 图像附件 · 应用内自动更新 - 作为单个 .exe 提供

英语 · 韩语


当答案涌入时，Markdown 会实时呈现。

✨ 特点

  • 模型选择器 - 通过 /v1/models 加载实时模型列表（失败时返回到精选列表）
  • 流式聊天 — 带有即时停止按钮的实时令牌流
  • 流式传输时实时降价 - 格式在答案到达时呈现（如 Claude / ChatGPT），而不仅仅是在完成时呈现
  • 推理显示 - 发出 Reasoning_content / <think> 的模型的可折叠思维（deepseek-r1 等）
  • 图像附件（视觉）——附加图像以询问视觉模型（llama-3.2-vision 等）；大图像会自动缩小
  • 应用内自动更新 - 检查 GitHub 版本，下载新的 .exe，验证其 SHA-256，然后将其自身交换到位（单文件友好，无安装程序）
  • 每个对话的使用情况 - 跟踪每个模型的请求和提示/完成令牌，以便您可以查看每个模型在对话中花费的内容（甚至跨聊天中模型切换）
  • 桌面启动器 - 全局热键（默认 Ctrl+Shift+Space）可从任意位置弹出快速聊天迷你窗口 + 系统托盘（关闭最小化到托盘）
  • 个性化 - 应用于每个聊天的自定义说明（关于您/响应风格）+可重复使用的提示预设
  • 可搜索模型选择器 — 通过键入过滤 100 多个模型
  • 消息操作 - 重新生成响应、编辑和重新发送用户消息、删除或复制单个消息
  • 可选择的降价 - 标题/列表/嵌套和任务列表/引用/表格/链接，带有复制按钮的语法突出显示的代码块；辅助文本可通过拖动选择
  • 对话管理 - 侧边栏搜索、日期组（今天/昨天/...）、固定、重命名、自动保存、模型生成的自动标题
  • 每个对话设置 - 系统提示、温度/最高 P/最大令牌/惩罚
  • 导出 — 复制整个对话或另存为 Markdown
  • 生活质量 — 滚动到底部按钮、记住窗口大小/位置、可折叠侧边栏、键盘快捷键
  • 安全存储 — 使用 Windows DPAPI 加密的 API 密钥、原子文件写入 + 损坏文件的自动备份
  • 多语言 — 英语和韩语 UI，可在“设置”中切换（首次运行时默认为您的 Windows 语言）
  • UI — 带有 NVIDIA 绿色口音的自定义无边框深色主题； ChatGPT/Claude 风格的布局（仅在您的消息上出现气泡）

📦 下载

从发行版中获取单个 NvChat.exe 并运行它。 它是一个独立的单个文件，即使没有安装 .NET 运行时也可以运行。 （Windows x64）

首次运行：该应用程序未经过代码签名，因此 Windows SmartScreen 可能会显示蓝色的“Windows 已保护您的电脑”提示。 单击更多信息 → 仍然运行。
一旦您使用自动更新进行构建，应用程序内就会提供新版本 - 无需手动重新下载。

🔑 获取 API 密钥

  1. 登录 build.nvidia.com
  2. 在任何模型页面上，单击“获取 API 密钥”以创建 nvapi-... 钥匙
  3. 首次启动时将其粘贴到“设置”窗口（或按 ⚙ 按钮），然后测试连接 → 保存
密钥仅存储在此 PC + 此 Windows 帐户上，并使用 DPAPI (%APPDATA%\NvChat\settings.json) 加密。 它无法在另一台电脑/帐户上解密。

⌨️ 快捷键

Key 行动
Enter 发送（可在“设置”中切换为 Ctrl+Enter）
Shift+Enter 新线
Ctrl+N 新对话
Ctrl+Shift+空格键 随时随地快速聊天（全球·可配置）

🛠️ 从源代码构建

# Run for development
dotnet run --project NvChat/NvChat.csproj

# Build the single-file release exe
dotnet publish NvChat/NvChat.csproj -c Release
# → NvChat/bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/NvChat.exe

需要 .NET 8 SDK (Windows)。

🚀 发布（自动）

推送 v* 标签会触发 GitHub Actions 工作流程 (release.yml)，该工作流程会构建单个 NvChat.exe、发布匹配的 NvChat.exe.sha256，并将两者上传到该标签的 Release。 应用程序的应用内更新程序使用该校验和来验证下载。

git tag v1.0.0
git push origin v1.0.0

🧩 Tech

.NET 8 / WPF (net8.0-windows)、MVVM、自定义 WindowView (无边框 WindowChrome)、深色调色板和自编写的 Markdown 渲染器 + 语法荧光笔 — 无需外部 UI 库。

  • 端点：https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1（兼容 OpenAI，可在“设置”中配置）
  • 数据：%APPDATA%\NvChat\（settings.json、conversations.json）
  • 免费套餐有速率限制 - 在 HTTP 429 上，稍后重试。

📄 许可证

MIT — 免费使用、修改和分发。
